No Poverty.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to eradicating poverty.

Zero Hunger.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to ending hunger or improving nutrition.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to health and well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course is tertiary education (Target 4.3) and aims to equip students with analytical tools for advanced studies and professional subjects, directly supporting relevant skill development (Target 4.4).
evidence: 做為日後繼續深造的基礎
提升其日後學習各種專業科目的學習成效

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to affordable and clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course develops '分析與解決問題的能力' (Ability to analyze and solve problems), a core competence essential for higher economic productivity and innovation (Target 8.2).
evidence: 分析與解決問題的能力
微積分是相當好的分析工具

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: Calculus is presented as a fundamental analytical tool for advanced studies, directly contributing to scientific research and technological innovation (Target 9.5).

Life on Land.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to life on land.
